'''Muskree''' was a backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its lone settlement was the failed [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony [[Hardscrabble]].

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040122threat|text=Triplet Threat|int=Triplet Threat}} {{1st}}
